rigor_applied.iprev_schedule: DEFERRED until platform-compile is shipped. Then run iprev for the four sibling changes (proc/desktop/ipc/bundle-ci) in ONE parallel pass — they depend only on platform-compile (whose shipped decisions stabilize cargo check --target + the CI gate) and not on each other for plan review. Decided 2026-06-26.

events.note: proposal+specs(platform-desktop-integration + scratchpad delta)+design+tasks authored; openspec validate --strict passed

Mode A plan review. Reconciled artifacts against post-platform-compile source (zbus now Linux-gated at Cargo.toml:116, show_items_via_dbus cfg-gated, reveal_in_downloads two-branch). Replaced runtime Err-fallback notification fallacy with build-time empirical gate (Decision 3/3a, task 6.0) since silent .show() Ok-no-display is not runtime-detectable. Corrected opener API to OpenerExt Rust path (bypasses capability ACL -> in-code scheme allowlist is sole security boundary, Decision 6/7, now tested). Fixed scratchpad reveal file-vs-dir behavior change (open_path not reveal_item_in_dir). Added existence-guard retention, trait imports, macOS notif permission sequencing, hermetic unit tests, non-Linux cfg stub. Transcript in handoff/REVIEW.md.

scope_note: Mechanical swap of Linux-only desktop commands to cross-platform Tauri plugins. Depends on platform-compile. Lowest port risk. zbus may still be pulled transitively by keyring secret-service on Linux (no full removal claim).
